name: Ratatouille Dip
recipeInstructions:
Makes 2 1/2 cups. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook eggplant, onion, green pepper, 3 tablespoons parsley, garlic, lemon juice, sugar, and Italian seasoning in oil for 5 minutes. Add tomato; simmer 5 more minutes or until vegetables are tender-crisp. Spoon into serving bowl; garnish with remaining parsley. Serve warm or cold as a dip with wafers.
Nutrition Information per Serving (1 tablespoon dip, 2 wafers):
Calories Total Fat Calories from fat Saturated Fat Cholesterol Sodium Dietary Fiber
